title: Puff Pastry Jam Tarts
description: Delicate puff pastry filled with sweet jammy goodness. Perfect for a sweet snack or dessert.
instructions: Roll out puff pastry on a floured surface to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Cut out circles of pastry using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
Place a spoonful of jam in the center of each circle.
Brush edges with beaten egg for a golden glaze.
Fold pastry in half to form a triangle and press edges to seal.
Place tarts on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
Allow tarts to cool on a wire rack before serving.
